popularStory.headline:
Thomasine Belgrave Frost
(1 February 1561 – 26 July 1616)
popularStory.description:
Thomasine was born in Leverington, Cambridgeshire in January of 1562 and baptised there on February 1, 1562. 

Her parents were John and Joanna Strutt Belgrave. 

Thomasine married Edward Frost at Gle …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasine Belgrave於1560年8月11日出生在英國坎布利其爾列福林頓時，她的父親John Belgrave25歲，母親Joanna Strutt19歲。她於1585年9月26日與Edward Frost在英國素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1616年7月26日之後在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦斯亞德，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯坦斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasine Belgrave于1560年8月11日出生在英国坎布利其爾列福林頓时，她的父亲John Belgrave25岁，母亲Joanna Strutt19岁。她于1585年9月26日与Edward Frost在英国素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1616年7月26日之后在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦斯亞德，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可斯坦斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Belgrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Leicestershire, recorded in Domesday Book as Merdegrave. The original name derived from Old English mearth ‘marten’ + grāf ‘grove’, but after the Norman Conquest the first element was taken to be Old French merde ‘dung, filth’, and changed to Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’, to remove the unpleasant association. A mid 12th-century writer refers to the place as ‘Merthegrave, nunc (now) Belegrava’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasine
meanings: Hebrew: A twin; Thomasine is a female version.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasine Belgrave was born on 11 August 1560, in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, John Belgrave, was 25 and her mother, Joanna Strutt, was 19. She married Edward Frost on 26 September 1585, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died after 26 July 1616, in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasine Belgrave est née le 11 août 1560, à Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, John Belgrave, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Joanna Strutt, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Frost le 26 septembre 1585, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 26 juillet 1616, à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Stanstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasine Belgrave am 11. August 1560 in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Belgrave 25 und ihre Mutter Joanna Strutt 19. Sie hat am 26. September 1585 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England Edward Frost geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb nach 26. Juli 1616 in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stanstead, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Belgrave è nata il il 11 agosto 1560 nel Leverington, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, John Belgrave, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Joanna Strutt, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Edward Frost il 26 settembre 1585, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì dopo il 26 luglio 1616, nel Stanstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Stanstead, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasine Belgraveが1560年8月11日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアレバーイントンで生まれた時，父John Belgraveは25歳，母Joanna Struttは19歳であった。1585年9月26日にイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでEdward Frostと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1616年7月26日以後にイギリスイギリススフォルクスタンステアドで死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクスタンステアドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasine Belgrave(이)가 1560년 8월 11일 영국 캄브리지실르 레버링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Belgrave(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Strutt(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1585년 9월 26일 영국 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 Edward Frost(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1616년 7월 26일 이후 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠스테아드에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스탠스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.11 August 1560–Aft 26 July 1616: 11 de agosto de 1560–após 26 de julho de 1616
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasine Belgrave nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1560, em Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Belgrave, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Strutt, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Frost em 26 de setembro de 1585, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu após 26 de julho de 1616, em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasine Belgrave родилась 11 августа 1560 г. в местности ливирингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Belgrave было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Strutt, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Frost 26 сентября 1585 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 26 июля 1616 г. в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности станстид, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.11 August 1560–Aft 26 July 1616: 11 de agosto de 1560–después de 26 de julio de 1616
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasine Belgrave nació el 11 de agosto de 1560, en Leverington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Belgrave, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Joanna Strutt, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Edward Frost el 26 de septiembre de 1585, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió después de 26 de julio de 1616, en Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Stanstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
